description: استخراج تعريفات الكلاسات والدوال من code_analyzer.py
command_preview:
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
with open(r'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for i, line in enumerate(f, 1):
        stripped = line.rstrip()
        if stripped.startswith('class ') or stripped.startswith('def ') or stripped.startswith('    def ') or stripped.startswith('if __name__'):
            print(str(i) + ': ' + stripped)
